heading: Where Beauty Meets Science
text:
Natural Beauty Clinic & Academy has been Kathmandu's trusted destination for premium beauty services and professional training since 2014. Located in the heart of New Baneshwor, we combine scientific expertise with artistic excellence.

Our state-of-the-art academy has trained over 800 students, offering internationally recognized certification in hair, skin, makeup and nail artistry. Every service is delivered with premium products, hygienic standards and a commitment to your satisfaction.
